[{"Name":"Natasha Oliver","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxnc5qHBFKABVqfLgOtP6SlzQ650n7Y8gdVamKBceLNHd_xQTb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great little spot.
We had croissants, scrambled eggs on avocado toast, and a yoghurt bowl.
Croissants were a little undercooked on the inside, which made a portion of one of them inedible, but everything else was great.

Cappuccino and smoothie were a huge success.

Thank you for having gluten-friendly options.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA5ylaFWcpF0BkSbFvL7Vss&fid=0x0:0xf9160869ea728a22"],"When":"2025-7-13"},{"Name":"Adrian H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX3XoBt3eq347GLULj1axvjUIZsASlcrjbyAsYLgJfPyrW-kgqL=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Average. Waiting time was too long. Took 30’ to serve a French toast, and Benedict eggs.
Besides this, flavor was mild.
Coffee ok, but not great.
Not worth the money or the time.
Much better options in the area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCJTaGSHCbMADnMcGLBsXYj&fid=0x0:0xf9160869ea728a22"],"When":"2025-11-15"},{"Name":"Maho Hernández","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUydvxCn6IxiRoEttO_m7YCjd_upg8eigWYq6dZOT52BTfpBpj8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Super nice coffee place! 100% recommended.

They have a brunch menu, where you can ask for coffee some salty, sweet, and juice. But, since we were not that hungry, we asked for just one plate each.

The avocado toast with hummus and eggs was really good, as well as the pancakes. For a sunny day in Madrid, we had iced coffee which was spectacular.

The atmosphere is elegant and cute. So if you eat that aesthetic photo, this is the place to go!

The service was super attentive too. Anddd, they had loyalty cards, which come in handy when you are a coffee lover that loves to go to the same place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICjusTsDg&fid=0x0:0xf9160869ea728a22"],"When":"2024-4-20"},{"Name":"Can Cetin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZj9Ux2d6GimwM4BPdMR3P2zCzLYmxaqpzFbvOfpR93BUgSh1G=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great breakfast spot located centrally in Madrid. We tried Tosta Huevos Revueltos y Aguacate and Tosta Boiato y Salmon together with very tasty latte. The taste was really great and the ambiance was simply a 5 star. You’re simply enjoying your breakfast under sakura trees inside a coffee shop. This place is must try in Madrid","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID_7KKEGw&fid=0x0:0xf9160869ea728a22"],"When":"2025-1-22"},{"Name":"Meghan Zhuka","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWtdUAYcauZbmgZ4jqOicm4h_fCCEKuWLNYl9S78H1sHvKfgVk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you’re in Madrid and looking for the perfect breakfast spot, look no further. This place is an absolute gem! From the moment you walk in, you’re greeted with warm smiles, the smell of fresh coffee, and the kind of cozy atmosphere that makes you want to stay all morning. The design is absolutely stunning!

I ordered the French Toast and a double espresso—simple, classic, and done to perfection. The food was absolutely amazing. And the coffee? One of the best coffees I’ve had thus far during my stay in Madrid.

Bonus points for the gorgeous presentation, super attentive staff, and how affordable everything was. Whether you’re fueling up for a day of sightseeing or just want a peaceful place to enjoy a slow morning, this is the spot. I can’t wait to go back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDI_oSC6QE&fid=0x0:0xf9160869ea728a22"],"When":"2025-4-10"},{"Name":"Timothy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU01SZZx4xHdf2QGtI80vWvQNAm7jlQ8-fVlhxIyTKdjD_sUzMxPw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thank you very much guys for that place, and it’s right next to the church I’m attending, so I’m happy to go there and enjoy your coffee

The atmosphere is really cool. The music sounds a bit loud though.
The food is tasty. The coffee is really good as well.  It is not that easy to find a good coffee for a decent price. Thank you for making my favorite filter! Definitely worth a visiting.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDg4tTG-AE&fid=0x0:0xf9160869ea728a22"],"When":"2025-2-23"},{"Name":"Mariah carpenter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgXR8zeVVnHXLIvnBhlsESP0uo1LDPuHjROAEZJ3i2I7_gM8-O0w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This weekend, I tried a new brunch and coffee spot near Chamberi Madrid. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Anisha Kaur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJipU9Z7fWLLNtBXYARsT3fYEjej9SvDRD_0UR56hekkTyt8A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My absolute favourite place to eat cake these past couple of years. It had been a few months, and I was craving it again, so I ordered my birthday cake from them. The staff were very friendly and kind throughout, and you can really tell how much care and attention they put into making everything the best it can be.

I ordered a vintage-style grape cake with black bows and added text. The packaging was stable and well done, and the design turned out exactly as I hoped. It truly helped make my birthday weekend more enjoyable!

On a side note, their macarons are also delicious, especially the chocolate ones, which are my favourite.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDeTKrtd7YJjKk_GO6nxU77&fid=0x0:0x8e4d85e5e698325"],"When":"2025-12-10"},{"Name":"Rachel Koh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXZ89I6CTG-7xbntUA9E66QYsylDYLcTgRizgKx8FmNOk2zzPfPXA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"this has been my all time favorite cafe since coming to madrid! i’ve tried so many different cafes in the city, but the friendliness of the service, tasty coffee, and calm interior is unmatched at kkori. i ordered my birthday cake here, and it was delicious, light, and fluffy! genuinely have never felt more comfortable than here, please give it a visit :) i recommend the seoul latte, hazelnut latte, and the scone!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCmzgYU1hvGDdzs3a3nem0t&fid=0x0:0x8e4d85e5e698325"],"When":"2025-12-5"},{"Name":"Isabella Perez (Bella)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV5mmjbT00dsIT21IYAdWSwoGfDBYFNjbx4mk6JF1EPM4v6X7DN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The staff are the sweetest! Their menu is full of awesome creations. They will kindly explain what each item is if you ask. The sesame coffee was interesting. The more sips I had the more I liked it! The food and cake were also delicious. It’s cozy inside with plenty space to relax.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBxErIf1w7oRfHdE3sh_qlo&fid=0x0:0x8e4d85e5e698325"],"When":"2025-11-21"},{"Name":"Yujin Shin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIzczH3YX7EGz5uBhJUvUpWJL2rj0FS4vMe4q126fI-A7wovUE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I ordered a customized cake from here for my boyfriend’s birthday party and it was the best cake I’ve ever had and everyone loved it! I contacted them via their Instagram account and their responses were super fast. They understood exactly what I wanted and the cake turned out perfectly. The taste was also 10/10! Amazing place and I’d definitely order from here again for special occasions and visit the café as a guest. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC2_inLOqBO3-9yF0RNRaAs&fid=0x0:0x8e4d85e5e698325"],"When":"2025-11-1"},{"Name":"Evan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3stz6TPpRlEtkamdF33adQZQBkXVxe2dzveqd9pl0ylW9_PA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This Korean workspace café offers gluten-free Asian-inspired desserts along with a wide selection of specialty drinks. The two Korean owners are very friendly and explain the menu clearly in both English and Spanish. The atmosphere is casual, relaxed, and has a unique style of its own.

We ordered a Matcha Strawberry Cake, a Strawberry Cream Cake, an Iced Seoul Latte, and an Iced Matcha Strawberry. Everything was excellent, and I especially enjoyed the Iced Matcha Strawberry. The total came to about 22 EUR, which is very reasonable given the portion sizes.

If you enjoy Asian-style or gluten-free desserts, this is a wonderful spot to check out. It’s also a comfortable place to bring your laptop, unwind, and enjoy a leisurely afternoon tea.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCLi8fC6yz1eA4beFImJChR&fid=0x0:0x8e4d85e5e698325"],"When":"2025-8-22"},{"Name":"R K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKylM5jTVf80wvCvpr94AUu9BqbVnn9SLKJMDhQI6BhujVyyw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cute cozy coffee place with great atmosphere, service and food.
We ordered a little birthday cake, perfectly spongy, fluffy, filled and topped with raspberry cream.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDdUkFQs31v5hi6A-CNNGAs&fid=0x0:0x8e4d85e5e698325"],"When":"2025-12-14"},{"Name":"Aleksandro Cuci","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI9xGgCzqDOc_7PD59PqPUymm5W8ZQPePITBxxIPQZ-bvJ1IQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Definitely one of the best coffee places in Madrid. They have many unique types of coffees and teas and I really recommend the korean ones, especially the Busan latte. The matcha is great and the cakes are delicious. You can tell that the ingredients have a high quality and on top of that, they put much care into details. It’s also possible to order custom cakes at least two days in advance, and they look amazing!!

The place is not too small, it’s very clean and nicely decorated. It’s also ideal for studying/working and there’s wifi.

What makes the experience incomparable is the kindness and attention of the staff. They are all really nice and available, which makes you feel very welcome.

100% recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDFTPu0QxnJ0fXZqjbVFNJ_&fid=0x0:0x8e4d85e5e698325"],"When":"2025-8-12"},{"Name":"Marcos Bisono","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUD3MS4n7XznjO24Wc1i0-kduZqFbDAzdc02h6wYJBruvEMmeIM0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The specialty coffee here is absolutely outstanding! The Busan coffee was incredible – rich, smooth, and full of flavor. I’ve also been to Japan, and I have to say this is the closest matcha to the authentic taste I experienced there. Absolutely delicious! On top of that, the service was wonderful – friendly, attentive, and welcoming. The atmosphere is vibrant and modern, with a cozy yet trendy vibe. The menu is thoughtfully curated.

I particularly enjoyed their innovative twists on classic dishes, paired with their tasty coffee. The staff were friendly, attentive, and clearly passionate about providing top-notch service. It's a great spot for a casual meal. I’ll definitely be coming back to enjoy more of their fantastic offerings! Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDP2-igAQ&fid=0x0:0xe2ae6e7a1b976596"],"When":"2024-12-5"},{"Name":"Bartek Sposób","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0pW-eazk0_t2mCQlubU46uIVV7JGR0QvkTiQTbU12MPkDAQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Unfortunately, the matcha was a big disappointment. It tasted just like plain milk with barely any matcha flavor at all. It was clearly poorly prepared, which you can also see in the photo – the texture and color were completely off. Really surprising coming from a specialty place where you’d expect much higher standards.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDwKNI4xVYL9YbU0XqMnHlz&fid=0x0:0xe2ae6e7a1b976596"],"When":"2025-8-1"},{"Name":"이채림","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWzcy2zyPnvMeVw4Le68ddrbGX0Xtc9J7qC3N7fOknpoAqsqcYD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"It used to be 15€ minimum order to work with the computer. Today you have to pay 20€, and you can use only 15€ for your order. It is not enough that you have to pay extra 5€, they even designed the menu so you will not be able to reach 15€ excatly - either 14.8€ or 16€.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Caio Pereira","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJN1DmrCrAiD-jEQeKZQLErmw4RUZ7V4XZ73Yx7OYb1T4i5gz4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Great vibe and awesome coworking space. However, very poor service for the standards of comparable coffee shops in Madrid. There were 4 employees, one of them did 90% of the work and the others totally lost. There were 2 people in front on us in the line and took us 17 min to get a capuccino. Should this issue of staffing and operations be solved, this has the potential to be the best coffee shop in Chamberi.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICzm_HWqAE&fid=0x0:0xe2ae6e7a1b976596"],"When":"2024-6-5"},{"Name":"Hortensia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGn_ewtnpi8hlaVMaLW0-u1SUj7ymYZeRT8G0UGF50hvHdR7qm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An ideal space - cowork and leisure
The ambience and design is very soothing and at the same time inspiring.
Food is a-m-a-z-i-n-g - so happy that apart from being delicious, it is very healthy and natural (so many options for any kind of dietary restriction like gluten or lactose intolerance)
Must try, the spirulina bowl and the avocado-egg-hummus toast!
They offer grade A, quality and specialty coffee. I tried various kinds from Colombia, Africa and Asia. I tried an 'orea' filtered coffee with orange slices and it was something special!

Their staff and service is really incredible - (Tito, Nash, Bauti and Juan put all their love into every thing they do!)
Must try this place out! Love what they are doing!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZwL_59wE&fid=0x0:0xe2ae6e7a1b976596"],"When":"2023-9-1"},{"Name":"Mary Shelow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3NTzzo9rWw7u6ziWYqsDgwlzPexQtBmUDkEOsCsanFC58MShIPw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"this is my go to coffee shop in Chamberi. [{"Name":"perkash singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXu7dcywv_MNTpZCBxFUFb1gvAFECTC4kFSV3h0P_mvDjKCFOmk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I visited this coffee place, which had a very modern and open design — and the clientele definitely reflected that. It was interesting to see a slightly different café concept. We ordered two mochas, and they were OK, but they really needed a bit more sweetness. Other than that, it was a good experience overall.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD88cvv2XeaLZlLd5hqfnRR&fid=0x0:0x4276c2e87fc44d28"],"When":"2025-11-18"},{"Name":"NomadCafeVibes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUJyQxTH9ZgnbyMXac7Ut1pZCtgF3uh7g1OH3N5lbUAaLB0DNdM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"For our Nomad 💻 tribe, here a few comments!

• Type of working: SOLO and SMALL GROUP | they have a corner table (fits 4 comfortable) and side table (casual seating no chairs - bench style, not so comfortable for long periods of laptop work) specifically for working on laptops. There are other tables but are marked for no laptops and only for eating. Also there is an upper floor but is not accessible for coworking.
• Music: 🎵 (medium) | it is a chill playlist that has some slow music that isn’t too loud  - perfect if you have to do some admin work or focus tasks.
• Coffee: ☕️☕️ (good)
• Dog friendly: with a small dog, it was no problem.
• Food: recommend the tostadas (in pictures) that are tasty and a good size for the price.

Overall: 4/5 ⭐️
+ The staff is friendly and service is quick.
+ Prices are reasonable for specialty coffee and brunch.
- The coffee was good, not amazing.
- The co-working space is comfortable if you manage to get a spot in the corner table.
*There are 2 locations, this review pertains to this specific location only.

Give it a try, cheers! ☕️

[{"Name":"Marco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-2vOmx_gYcTUN1FbBaFgSW-izsaWOsvy2EtTJIyXqd7R8_w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This is a nice coffee shop in the heart of Madrid. The staff is very knowledgeable, friendly and welcoming. The quality of their products is superb, with a large variety of drinks/food to choose from. The space is also clean. Worth visiting and check when they are having medialunas (in my opinion, the best ones I’ve tried so far in the city).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDj-aTT0AE&fid=0x0:0xd39e657b8e792895"],"When":"2024-5-5"},{"Name":"A Gentle Supportive Soul","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXeDcebDCzS3cZclcJEGLiZirVHpSmYcheIwGVhuPl68YKu8N56cg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Very nice building and location in the center of Madrid and near the Bilbao metro! The coffee and sweets that I had were all good. I appreciate the quiet in this cafe where many young people are working or studying. Strong wifi, nice view outside, available water for free. Friendly and helpful barista. I just wish they have more space for the sitting that faces the tall beautiful windows. There is a water bowl outside where your pet can have a drink.

There is an area downstairs where some paintings are available for you to see and buy. Nice clean toilet.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICN6ta9jgE&fid=0x0:0xd39e657b8e792895"],"When":"2024-1-13"},{"Name":"R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWzeQZfwtopE_yIcLP-CdYW08MMhiZX-hfUI2h2cTX5CKsQPC31=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My friend ordered more than €16 (I paid my friend for half of it), which meets the €8 laptop-use requirement for two people. However, we were informed that the amount had to be paid by two different individuals. This doesn’t make sense, because the total amount we ordered, more than €16, was paid by both of us, each of us had a drink and a couple of sweets. Technically, I spent more than €8 at this café (since I paid my friend).

By that logic, if we used a €20 bill to order two €10 meals for two people, it would still be counted as a single order by one person, unless we first break the €20 into two €10 bills so that the two of us can order separately. I understand the €8 requirement for laptop use, but I don’t understand why it must be split into two separate transactions.

Again, I spent more than 8€ tonight, just so you know.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mikhail Suvorov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWj9HgYeSRMB0h4nmQjuscXkm7-bx3ieo94xAC5VRNmDZQOknMF2g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent place, awesome & friendly barista will definitely make your day with that perfect cup you are looking 👀 for at specialty coffee place. Lot’s of different preparation methods, different coffees with perfectly matching sweets (they have toast as well). Ordered several drinks out there (V60, AeroPress, Flat White) - thanks to barista all three were just perfect.
As always- just my opinion. ☕️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC-nKWZbA&fid=0x0:0xd39e657b8e792895"],"When":"2022-10-29"},{"Name":"Angelo Timpanaro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLIynBQw5OE7_Z3W1RiN4Sm0Tn0KeQRgc4JkgrVczTC7unfTflm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"ÖSS Madrid is a charming café nestled in the heart of Madrid, offering a serene escape from the bustling city streets. With its inviting atmosphere and impeccable service, it's no wonder this café earns high praise.

The star of the show is undoubtedly the coffee, with the cappuccino stealing the spotlight. Rich, creamy, and expertly crafted, each sip is a delight for the senses. Accompanying the coffee are delectable sweets that, while petite in size, pack a punch of flavor, leaving taste buds longing for more.

While prices may lean towards the higher end, the experience is well worth it. The peaceful ambiance, particularly on the ground floor, provides the perfect backdrop for meaningful conversations and quiet contemplation. Whether you're catching up with a friend or seeking solace with a good book, ÖSS Madrid offers a haven of tranquility amidst the hustle and bustle of city life.

In summary, ÖSS Madrid is a must-visit for coffee enthusiasts and seekers of serenity alike. From the superb coffee and delightful sweets to the enchanting atmosphere, this café delivers an experience that nourishes both the body and the soul.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICdvZbwwAE&fid=0x0:0xd39e657b8e792895"],"When":"2024-2-17"},{"Name":"benaya simeon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBcN4UwkvZ-ExfwioX9tO9xBQYrCQyDXvty062x-s1Z82vp6M5vA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"For me who came from Indonesia, I really could say, they have good coffee...
I satisfied having my afternoon coffee there, really out of my expectation!
Their basement was very comfort and interesting... adding more good ambience while enjoying my coffee and my brownies!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIChiMDfCw&fid=0x0:0xd39e657b8e792895"],"When":"2023-2-3"},{"Name":"Bianca Pinho Casaes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJt1Tqp50vk5uO2EGX_8xlRSlhETKbqD3Ja_EOwMqTCehtsVA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"coffee takes a long time to be prepared and baristas are rude. asked them to heat my brownie, waited for 10 minutes and in the end had to go remind them about it again. Coffee was pretty mediocre as well","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"eduardo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLYgvVUKiC54CTDwu-kt8MmMBeu0aWzUJ2_odkivU_lbte3yg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Such a bad experience. Interestingly enough, it seems also to be a home to the ethical Triodos Bank","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOKknNLPwf_i9wE&fid=0x0:0xfe5235a41f3de485"],"When":"2025-5-6"},{"Name":"Gabriel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLTXkqKQ00QuJ8DQSAb9sxxGbbhEXFDcwkizPPdAP2Vqam9Iw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I wanted to try it out for one day to decide if I want to continue, but definitely not. Firstly they only open at 9:00, which is quite late. But fine, it was written on their infos on google maps, so I delayed my first meeting (usually at 9:00) to 09:15. When I arrived at the reception desk, the lady asked me to wait 5 minutes. After almost 20 she called me and processed my day pass. I asked where were the phone cabins as I had some important calls that day and she said “you need to download an app for the cabins, once you download it, come back here and I show you how it works”. I downloaded, came back to the reception desk and than she said “oh, I’m sorry, they are all booked, but you can do meetings in the cantine”. The flex space where I booked is not a proper office, but a hall to access the small offices, so there are people walking around the whole time on their phone.

The office is extremely loud, can’t recommend if you need a space for meetings or simply a quiet space to have some work done.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dimitar Dishev","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVaQWlFk-NI_P8eD87R7lzgs3hO-UTAqpPrvy1zPtt-maYNapL-Ag=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"You wait outside until 9:00 if you are just with a day pass. Coffee costs 0.80 cents additionally if the machine is working, meeting rooms are at additional cost, you better book an airbnb for less money.
They don’t speak English, no english signs anywhere in the space. Extremely cold in the common areas, outside temperature was around 10 degrees, almost the same inside.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jean de Colombel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-2fMKS17vGTfYEUyt6_z2g8pnkD4bpj0ijW3NPbBMnRCKBKGa=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The only coffee machine didn't work during most of the day. There is no place to make phone calls without disturbing. So if you want to have a real and not stressful day of work, go in an other place. Too expensive for the level of service.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jacco Minnaar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKgESAq9l1hAxAjPpkzWOKktsU27NTHWMMhkO_7XQtuuL-GdA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice place for impact organisations, good atmosphere and soon Triodos Bank will be opening here!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marc Wetselaar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXpBu3AYmftZphXwg6-n_vjAj-PDJ05Y2YDJNdSxS0XX8AJxFwn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great space, open and light but quiet and private when needed.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yannick v","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXIJ3GA85GZGexQfcl7Y1UYiJ63F6qQJC4QMooClxUN0E8yZn53=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A lot of light and well located. Fresh pressed juices and ginger shots, yummy protein shakes and coffee to order. My new favorite spot to stop for a coffee or a quick snack. The best part, it is attached to a Lagree studio. Perfect to grab a protein shake after working out. Love AMA!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAlLYSmyrxdNvm2G0xnUPkb&fid=0x0:0x3de2577a84804a6d"],"When":"2025-9-13"},{"Name":"Maira Shah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7hYtLnX-r9uXKzyVOkOlqyyRTIjsWOjF7kHA9kHDw_RV7uJQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely the BEST Lagree studio in Madrid!  I’ve tried several places, and nothing compares to the energy, professionalism, and attention to aesthetic Pinterest clean girl era detail here. The instructors are not only incredibly knowledgeable but also super motivating—they push you to your limits in the best way possible. Every class is a full-body workout that leaves you shaking, sweating, and stronger every time.

The studio is spotless, the machines are top-notch, and the vibe is always positive and empowering. Whether you’re a beginner or a Lagree veteran, they make you feel welcome and supported. After just a few sessions, I already noticed a difference in my core strength, posture, and endurance.

If you’re serious about fitness and want fast results in a fun and challenging environment, this is the place to be in Madrid. Highly recommend.

The best about it is the cafe with high quality matcha and the best bowls in town.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDoQ2Rj3V_1D3v83K-1rmjv&fid=0x0:0x3de2577a84804a6d"],"When":"2025-6-9"},{"Name":"Josi Tucker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7L79lbua68RLxI4hY77ZnLyno_krEy8jvtki_5p-9zUZp1kP0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I took a class here and got coffee after. [{"Name":"Alberto Mario Guzmán","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVAt7Ko_rf8nNnNBmm4rS8NLHARu8_O8bHI7bXeuDax5RunNjeOWA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been at Cloudworks Cibeles for about 10 months now, and honestly, it feels like home.

The space has such a good energy; lots of natural light, beautiful design, comfortable offices, and two rooftops with unreal views of Cibeles and Puerta de Alcalá. It’s the kind of place that makes you enjoy coming to work.
But what I value the most is the people. The community here is real. The breakfasts, the events, the everyday conversations, you naturally connect with inspiring professionals without forcing it.
At Deban Derecho, where I work as Marketing Specialist, environment really matters to us. Being based here supports the way we see business: human, dynamic and built on relationships.
And a special thank you to Irene, Celia and Auxy, always welcoming, always smiling, always ready to help. That warmth makes a difference.
If you’re looking for a coworking space in Madrid that feels professional but still warm and alive, this is definitely it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD5R95qSLk6b4xtfQDbn_zX&fid=0x0:0xdca8cc8b123420e9"],"When":"2026-2-19"},{"Name":"Marcela Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXBshAt_yU2x9nJ-sJF2dmJhMS7L6csjddLdYsR2SNTHoDNNSAU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just visited We Are Cloudworks, and I can confidently say it’s an amazing place to work. The atmosphere is welcoming, and the space is thoughtfully designed for productivity. Irene, the receptionist, is incredibly friendly and easy to talk to—she’s always ready to help with any issue you might have, making the experience even better.

The views are simply stunning, especially overlooking Puerta de Alcalá and the surrounding areas of Madrid. On top of that, they offer fresh fruit, coffee, tea, and milk for guests to enjoy, which is a thoughtful touch.

Great space, great people—I’ll definitely be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD_LfCXXPN7HDNfS_cuALUO&fid=0x0:0xdca8cc8b123420e9"],"When":"2025-7-3"},{"Name":"Lily Tahara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUadhOfJZk68bovPzIzDQqZ50dKWnPYrDF6JUs2V07U1DqpNg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love this coworking space! The staff are amazingly accommodating and always there to help with any need. The space is complete with so many little details that show that they truly care. And the community is great! Everyone is very welcoming and open to connecting.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"laura fama","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUoc3tc8rzF_itFghWjOIZEuNunB7ZSTSHUzjzm2p-k9jX0pUbj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've been living in Spain for 4 years as a solo entrepreneur. Working from home post-pandemic made me realize how much more productivity I can achieve by working at Cloudworks. Andrea is great who is the office a manager. She's very helpful. Private spaces, quiet, perfect for co working 5 days a week. Worth the price and good kitchen area as well. Thanks cloudworks team. Top co working in the city and not a bad view either!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDBzMTuHg&fid=0x0:0xdca8cc8b123420e9"],"When":"2023-1-13"},{"Name":"Marc Fournier (MF Event)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFqNw87COWlxgJgf5o2nSw3PXiUtwwpuqZFZfuqI3l0ifjKGxy=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Célia was Kind and Helpfull at the entrance !
Facilities to work there are peacefull and perfect for remote Work

Will Come back for sur !

Thanks","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDppNTY5QE&fid=0x0:0xdca8cc8b123420e9"],"When":"2023-8-16"},{"Name":"Andressa L.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXp1gbuUi_KcPBSW2-f4Yoi_9L3g7YFeJyo8mbG_LHKayFwOrAsUw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had a terrible experience in this place.

As a person who likes to visit coworking spaces for working, when I saw an event on eventbrite about an activity on Cloudworks, I thought it would be a great chance to visit the place. But not.

The event, with Sofar, was posted by mistake. I tried to contact people from the coworking to ask about this event and even people from the Sofar event. No one replied to me. I went there, and I had no idea that was there by mistake. I went to the space the manager of the "Sofar" embarrassed and builed me. She was super rude, saying that was eventbrite foult, just to excese herself of not doing anything to help. Instead of understanding that I didn't know it was a mistake and I had wasted my time going there, she was super rude and fighting with me. It was a terrible night, and I was facing problems to move forward after this situation.

I don't recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carmen Corvalan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKoDWps4G7ge6VQEW5pYukRwWHvYp-dqLJChlXmrcjJVBShhxr9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great work environment, fast Wi-Fi, the team set you up smoothly, amazing coffee, confortable and SUPER confortable and ergonomics chairs, bright offices and very open and clean spaces! If you are looking for a nice place to work, please do not hesitate to come to Cloud!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"JC Aller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWBpPPjbJai6zaK-74uoWvRdY7Y7x2yeNbE8M1F8TFpXZvqci3UDA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This could possibly be the best coworking space in Madrid. Great space, well communicated and superb service. Totally recommended!","Images":null,"When":""}]

Imagine the table in the foto while we were all eating, nothing fits so uncomfortable","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCKKvzRtw24gSvs5DpYEGTH&fid=0x0:0x8f5d398649b2e2f1"],"When":"2026-2-7"},{"Name":"ola khalifah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUEUhIGUVyTdgsmNY7652Lz9GCz3tJrQxTqk1UnKdZuWkTbir0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I really had the best experience here the staff was very nice and understanding we arrived 10 minutes before closing yet we told them that we came here by taxi only for them and they take our order and asked us to be comfortable and to stay as much as we like , they gave us the best coffee experience in Madrid. And also respected us as Muslims
Thx toma cafe for this great team you have 🫰🏻🫰🏻","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAU0HNNcARHrcINwA0GPOiZ&fid=0x0:0x8f5d398649b2e2f1"],"When":"2025-11-11"},{"Name":"Vera Zhukova","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVYzaBa3AgVW0epqJr9X1SIFf6IvWD-jSUr3j21mtVoU8F8ynI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My big love for many years. Every time I visit Madrid, I come here for the perfect cappuccino. Time goes on, baristas change, but the quality stays the same. Every time I get a perfect cappuccino with perfect latte art. I really appreciate this commitment to quality.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAZTq-AKNVANPT44NPzOu2N&fid=0x0:0x8f5d398649b2e2f1"],"When":"2025-11-5"},{"Name":"Anna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUgkSCcZcafqyJH3l0RxsbCcIyw5fY8OMtpryj40MBGDscY5o4Y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I ordered a medium Flat White and received a small one. I told the barista (the long haired Argentinian one) that thats not a medium coffee, but a small one. He then perceived to tell me that that's a medium, and showed me a cortado cup saying that's small. I was late at work so I just left but it's unbelievable how some people just wanna scam you. Besides this when I first told him that the coffee was a small, not a medium, he started talking to me with a very bad and superior attitude, gaslighting me.
I bought coffee from Toma in the past three  years almost daily, but this is gonna end now.

---------
Answer to the owner: I was not expecting for you to say anything good after reading all your answers to other people's complains. It's very funny how, instead of saying "oh we're so sorry for what happened" you keep pointing the finger to those in the right. I explained which barista it was so you could know and talk to him for the future, but it's clearly you're just like him. A scammer between scammer. All those ugly answers to people's reviews... it's amazing how people still buy from Toma. Your attitude is disgusting. "No drama just coffee"? Yeah, when you won't be scammed on your own money. Until then, shhh. But don't worry, controls are on their way. Your business will be revived soon, or are u paying peple to be quiet? ;)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBsUo5UtaFV5-0m93mUEz7c&fid=0x0:0x8f5d398649b2e2f1"],"When":"2025-10-14"},{"Name":"Kristina Völk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKo4BA3vg-yrtcc0a3jvDrCCuucqXn5-e82jwAnflVygG3W=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent coffee!! The staff is friendly and knowledgeable and the coffee tastes really good. The breakfast menu is simple but delicious. It’s a great spot to sit outside. Also the music selection is great - good vibes in general. Shoutout to the Maradona trinkets.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCo8qvAQw&fid=0x0:0x8f5d398649b2e2f1"],"When":"2025-4-16"},{"Name":"Pency Lucero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVvdoAahFIB1Fft6iiG5ERm8WsLfEX6obOl4OsVeX3XyPzAZyba=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My best day in the summer of Madrid consist of staying here late afternoon (6-8pm) outside drinking matcha and reading a book then walking all the way to Parque del Oeste to loiter on the grass and watch the sunset! I love the fountain near this place and it’s just in a really cool location which is actually hard to find if you’re traveling enough. Other than that, matcha is on point! Went in to get some snacks for the playground and tea. Asked for para llevar (to go) when ordering  (for tea) and he didn’t say anything. Halfway through my order he quite rudely asked if I spoke English, while ordering a croissant so I yet again requested un croissant and magically, after his less than endearing insinuation, he could hear croissant once he tried to make an example of me. 15 min later we got my tea and some snacks on a tray and in a tea pot. When asked about to go he said it wasn’t possible. Realistically they should get a one *, especially considering their very large selection of English books and behavior, though we were more interested in their Spanish ones. But they have a nice location, cute shop, and good treats. But perhaps some training on basic customer service (or civility) could help 🤷‍♀️ we won’t be returning :/","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rebecca L.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUhPhRjv9zKLFUbMLYdYGmjooogN5jnmw1wh_RxYHUhpoNyfB9b=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Cute little corner book shop with a little bit of most genres. [{"Name":"alvaro perez - estrada","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXGXFokOio_Agc2LSWuGAHDapxWcXdZPpq-7r0LQcMBhGInnQb-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"SharingCo on Calle Caracas 6 is an amazing coworking space in the heart of Madrid! The modern, well-lit environment is perfect for productive work, with fast Wi-Fi, unlimited free coffee and fruit, and spaces for both focus and collaboration.

What sets it apart is the strong sense of community, thanks to regular events. The staff are super friendly and always helpful, making the experience even better.

If you're looking for a professional yet welcoming coworking spot in Madrid, SharingCo is the place to be!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"James Gooden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIi7JZHi3XdnMu4-gL9-PxgVoZR335L1GzndmM1LPOTeCAIfQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We have had a terrible experience with Sharing Co. They are non existent as property managers. We have had several problems in the apartament they rented for us in Madrid.  It has been over a week they have not fixed the airconditioner/heater. They sent a guy here who didn't fix anything. The Internet signal is week and slow. We were without water in the apartament.  Mediocre company with mediocre service at best","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jack Phelan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJcZGAJhiCyq_uRPspamrptFFYeuPmukjkmXsunXYRYoRar6w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We have not had Air Conditioning in our apartment for 2 weeks and they have been unresponsive. They also put a hole in our bathroom wall and did not patch it up as it continues to smell and attract bugs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Acro Glider Pilot","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKpvt5BdcGmN9WfHZElnDhpnfpXolJxw7g-E6Ukb12dt41gZQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"2024-Apr: no one seems to work at the office. I've tried multiple times to use their website/calendly to make appointments with them, with no response.

Since it was nearby, I went to the location at the time I selected in the calendly, and there was no staff on site.  One of the members let me in.  It's one floor with some offices, a very small kitchen and a lounge area. Looks like it has 5-8 free hot desks.  I don't really know.

If you a nomad looking to hotdesk, this is not the place.

If you live nearby, need a permanent space and don't want a lot of interaction with lots of new people (and don't need the staff to be available or communicate), this might be the place.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ines Hot","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5O0YDP-otSjbYiOEPM2hLmkFeTFgQxlFF_xWEhNPY7c0Hvw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great working space, with friendly staff, and amazingly located! We waited 3 hours on the sidewalk and ended booking an hotel in order to have a place to stay
This is a matter of double booking ( We booked through booking and the persons on the apartment booked through airbnb)
Extremely bad experience","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Travelholic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXUC6TnXfDxJnZtpG1mR87V4bh-Oxej8BoFGn9vmlzsrQ7u7Vq9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Booked an apartment with SharingCo El Rastro. user_reviews: [{"Name":"Brice Pissard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVn9NGlCd_oDkYkRQQI4u36N36NJqIt0dQ5EYArQLBWFPwuJLZ-JQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very interesting place that always shows well documented pieces of art. In this exhibition about Mexicain « dia de los muertos » casa Mexico shows différents interprétations of différents artists that makes you totally in the mood of the synchretism between the post May world and christianism. A sort of totemisation of the past, colorful and faithful. Definitely worth a visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC--cDGDQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x102485de7195b064"],"When":"2022-11-8"},{"Name":"William Denis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWrw3qLnOmCJbkCG7BMbYJevpR2dBsDGRjhs0bEznCm1qMNhBQY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Today I saw that the exhibition in this cultural espace from Mexico is very interest and in the afternoon I went in the Fundación, as was told to me by a gentleman, today the exhibition is only for invited people today. Which is absolutely normal and I really went in a day that is not open to the public. But thats not the point of my coment here. The point is that the moment I put my feet inside, a security person come to me and asked me in a VERY RUDE way where I am going and with which person I am with. Without a hello, without a good afternoon, not with the level of politeness I expect from someone working in a door of a foundation that represents a country. You should train your employees better to treat the public with more politeness. I was treated as someone that could represent some danger and thats ridiculous.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Oki Muñoz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVP7DAbbVWIJRJrbGhWZI0N7wBgYHagdzgudMLOiPKwT65v-iKDEg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing place to get in touch with the Mexican culture. You can get a traditional Mexican cooking class, visit a Mexican art show, see a Mexican concert,buy a mexican book or buy traditional crafts. Definitively a great place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDExc2CRQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x102485de7195b064"],"When":"2019-5-14"},{"Name":"Emma Schouten","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJzc8LfqJhueTczlUKBgoeJ033fhoOkdme6Ui48qfKPtNdwC4L=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I have never been to a museum about Mexico and what I know is from TV and a few books. The museum was interesting with some really pretty pieces. The Dia de Los Muerto exhibit/pieces were colorful and beautiful. What I missed were some explanations in English about items and maybe about the traditions. Also more indications of where to go. It was a little confusing at first.\n\nThe Frida Kahlo exhibition wasn't at all for me. It was really expensive and I didn't like the art. Because the indications were so confusing, I didn't know I had paid for the exhibit until it was too late, otherwise I never would have done it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID-xv_bzgE\u0026fid=0x0:0x102485de7195b064"],"When":"2022-11-28"},{"Name":"carmen taoying","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQBTlUwe-SNeibZEd74OsxWQhL8tOBdymG7oXlJDo7EwlPimTx=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great free exhibition.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBOmlq-865gDWm6CQlX8h9Y\u0026fid=0x0:0x102485de7195b064"],"When":"2025-10-29"},{"Name":"Narendran Bhaskaran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWkDe2ZYqd-GdoV7HDuA3rMnBcpbFn44l-ktm9WcexnJk11kR-wmA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It is a very beautiful place in order to understand Mexican culture. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ainara Alberdi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQDVANgmZUQGEBLmo_Ik9uy7CJh_GMUb7osYJuvGf4pyXHFWM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing studio!!!
My first contact with ceramics was here and I fell in love with it.
The space is beautiful, Sofi and Susana are patient and kind, you get inspired by the beauty and ideas from others, learn different technics and enjoy connecting with the clay and working with your hands.

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Estefania Jiménez Ocampo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocISst0fDFZmjEj3tCKZ3aGzIN2Mb_FMj6IPDpi9T98DhoekgA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Empecé a entrenar con Carlos después de varios años buscando soluciones a mi aumento constante de peso y a los problemas de salud relacionados con la tiroides y el azúcar. Gracias a su ayuda, incorporé hábitos mucho más saludables y una rutina de entrenamientos completos, combinando trabajo de fuerza y cardio. Eso me permitió lograr el cambio físico y de salud que tanto necesitaba. Hoy puedo decir que he perdido 15 kilos y que mis problemas de salud han mejorado notablemente, gracias al seguimiento nutricional y deportivo de Carlos. Además de que las clases son muy amenas y Carlos es una excelente persona","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Javier M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUg5otguhd25GquuAfZTGUHzGoN-dMrak1kYyscN6-TL5oqLfFt=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tengo que confesar que comencé a entrenar con el equipo sin mucha motivación, nunca he sido amigo de los gimnasios y la constancia siempre ha sido mi principal punto débil. Han pasado ya tres meses y puedo decir que es una de las mejores decisiones que he tomado en mucho tiempo. ¿Cómo es posible que no lo hiciera antes?…Bendita la hora . Un 10 para Carlos, que hace que las sesiones de entrenamiento sean el equilibrio perfecto entre esfuerzo, motivación y diversión. Otro 10 para el equipo,  ambiente e instalaciones.  Mi salud física y emocional están empezando a dar grandes pasos.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Igor Rosetti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXcXB-7079FI704u3SFlDjwnVRs0BnTZj3kbQhAyZmcb85qT1c=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Esta ha sido mi primera vez con personal trainer y llevo desde octubre entrenando con Carlos. La verdad que no puedo estar más contento!
Además de ser extremadamente profesional, preparado y siempre dispuesto a ajustar las sesiones según mis necesidades, todo lo hace siempre con una sonrisa en la cara y hace que los entrenamientos nunca resulten aburridos. Se lo recomiendo a cualquier persona que quiera mejorar su rendimiento y aspecto físico o incluso quiera empezar desde cero. 10/10","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ana Gonzalez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVs7aCyFK8Y-QAuVosjGe3VMydx6Srx07CJM1kcmcXk6ElrGzqu=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Empecé a entrenar en 2023 con Carlos de Madrid Entrena para reforzar la musculatura porque tenía muchos problemas de espalda y cuello, y la única solución que me ofrecían los médicos eran infiltraciones y operaciones de columna. Antes tenía que tomar medicación para el dolor todos los meses y ahora si acaso una vez al año.
Carlos sabe bien como medir el punto exacto para trabajar adecuadamente la musculatura sin llegar a forzar, y los entrenamientos son amenos y divertidos. He pasado de no haber hecho ejercicio en mi vida a hacerlo 5 días a la semana y disfrutar de ello. Para los días  que no entreno con él, me hace una rutina de entrenamiento adaptada a mis capacidades y objetivos, y que puedo hacer tanto en casa como en un gimnasio. Además, estamos siempre en contacto por si tengo dudas o molestias.

Cada persona y cada situación individual necesita un profesional diferente, pero en mi caso ella ha sido un rayo de luz enorme. Además es una persona con un gran corazón.

[{"Name":"James Gillingham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWnzEbnsLmbe5Y-7aTakIAX1mFsfqTlfflQvN1lJ_xz40JQyuLn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I needed a place to work for a day while in Madrid and Espiritu23 was the closest to my hotel. I was given a very friendly welcome from the owner who forgave my fumbling Spanish and showed me all of the facilities.

The internet connection is very fast and the coffee is pleasingly strong.

It's close to lots of shops and bars, perfect for grabbing lunch.

I worked a very happy day and will definitely return next time I am in Madrid.

Highly recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Corinna Lange","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUV5-eP4ZU43BA8rhyJPnUWOcy4X1kcCetEWhBDxM38AGrLunFr-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I LOVE this place! I've been coming to work here mostly irregularly and enjoy working and socializing here so much. Everyone is super welcoming, the team is helpful and very flexible with any specific needs. People share coffee breaks and lunch together and there`s also plenty of social events. What I like most, is the mixture of locals and internationals. Overall, feels like "family" and I can only recommend it 100%.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDOs6vHFw&fid=0x0:0xd500343711f8d34c"],"When":"2022-7-13"},{"Name":"Lourdes Serrano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJphsx6RTYq7C0cI7-4coHcmc7HdtdjEI2tqWEOI7bSph-bQw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice place to work because cool environment, global and diversity people. The area is also great in terms of bars and coffee shops. The tariffs are good and flexible, you can rent for 1 moth, weeks, days also hours. The connectivity WiFi is working well.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sherif Abaza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVoCk5W5ygePn0qpZdQ5p_Fgri_ikzlwPIcPeRRcBnL0ZJ8X43j=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I really enjoyed the week I spent working here.

Great and Fast and Reliable interner. ✅
Friendly staff (Thanks David) ✅
Clean and spacious ✅
Dedicated power connections on each desk ✅

Also a nice outdoor space if you want to take a call outside. Great location surrounded by some cure bars and great restaurants (Close to two other places I highly recommend Hanso Cafe ans Pez 8)

If they could find a way to get some more light and greenery in the place, this would become a 5 star review.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gil Parsay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXB1xEW57WiETGLgGG-DEQ9j05DvN6NLFqbaPOK2Dqzl28gH3Au=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I felt very comfortable working at Espíritu 23 while I stayed in Madrid. You have everything you need and the location is great in the middle of Malasaña.

Thank you David","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Christy Romer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV94SE3LWJQs0tRgjmDXd3ImU_EkPvCRnEl_ijuzqxvG5LZlhFY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've been working here for almost a year -- really, really lovely environment and a very welcoming group of people. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Irma Gutiérrez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWIBEuZIOAU3s4PIpg0JyilTIIFLCOwkRjrvk93NhX8PWrqPk9d=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Meraki Salud es un coworking sanitario de referencia en Madrid, ideal para cualquier profesional de la salud que busque un espacio moderno, flexible y con todas las garantías.

Cuenta con dos centros en ubicaciones estratégicas: Moncloa, con 9 salas de distintos tamaños, y Almagro, con 6 salas igualmente equipadas.

El sistema de alquiler de consulta es muy sencillo y competitivo. Lo mejor es la flexibilidad horaria: reservas la sala que quieras, a la hora que quieras, sin depender del gestor de la clínica. Aquí eres dueño absoluto de tu espacio y de tu tiempo, lo que te da independencia total para organizar tu consulta como más te convenga.

Las instalaciones están muy cuidadas: todas las salas están totalmente equipadas, con camilla, calefacción central, a/a y adaptadas para distintas especialidades sanitarias como fisioterapia, psicología, nutrición, podología, entre otras.

Además, la clínica dispone de baño para hombres y baño para mujeres, así como una zona de espera cómoda para que los pacientes estén tranquilos hasta el momento de ser atendidos.

En mi experiencia, trabajar en Meraki Salud me ha permitido centrarme en mis pacientes, sin costes fijos elevados ni preocupaciones de gestión.

Los pacientes lo valoran mucho: destacan la comodidad de las instalaciones, el ambiente profesional y la buena ubicación.

Otro punto fuerte es el ambiente entre compañeros: compartir clínica con otros sanitarios enriquece el trabajo y genera colaboraciones muy positivas.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Patricia Juárez de la Torre","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_9yukLHdQu9S9PO2Sge5HZVlOlJ0D1DA3cmHDOcr8BwGMPEHs=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Encontré hace años en este coworking sanitario el alquiler de consulta que necesitaba: un espacio cómodo, profesional y flexible, ideal para mi trabajo en fisioterapia. La clínica es acogedora, mis pacientes se sienten a gusto y para mí ha sido la mejor solución para ejercer mi profesión sin complicaciones y en un sitio de confianza","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nacho Deramond","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdWZFAVMhXHaABxsAFiOijQVVggZx-8GnM_sE_SxBOLRucZvaH_g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"He alquilado varias salas de fisioterapia y es muy cómodo. Primero alquiler por horas, porque no tenía muchos pacientes. Luego me pasé a turnos, que sale mejor de precio.

Gracias a este concepto innovador, fisioterapeutas, psicólogos, médicos... pueden desarrollar su labor clínica de una manera flexible y sobre todo libres de otras cargas de gestión (administrativas, logísticas...) que pueden dificultar el desempeño clínico en la consulta, pudiendo concentrar todo el esfuerzo en lo que verdaderamente importa, los pacientes y sus tratamientos.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gabriela García","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVnXLFiMLfYBiNlJ_abJtO-AO7kAQOdu5FcUrlvswqDL7GfUm8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Compré un cupón en groupon para este centro y algo que me sorprendió y decepcionó la limpieza fue muy básica, uno se acerca a que limpien bien el rostro, pero desde que llegue  me ofrecieron 5 veces peeling facial, la insistencia por vender algo más a tu paquete promocional realmente es incómodo, yo fui por la limpieza facial completa y la microdermoabrasion  y la persona que me atendió me ofrece peeling lo cual no es recomendable  si vas a ir a un lugar donde estarás expuesto al sol no puede insisitirme en un procedimiento que implica exposiciones de mi piel, le tuve que preguntar si  voy a   estar expuesta no es contraproducente, recién ahí dejo de insistirme porque tuve que decirle que viajaba y que yo tenía entendido que no podría llevar sol ni salir en fotos por como estaría mi piel. A lo que terminó diciendo ah bueno si pero te la puedo agendar ahora o después...Retomando el tema de la limpieza los pasos que siguió fueron:
1. Aplicarme una crema con gránulos (asumo que es el exfoliante) y luego unos algodones con agua y me puso  una mascarilla
2. Me secó la cara y me pasó la máquina de microdermoabrasion menos de 3 min duró este paso
3. Al ver que solo me había hecho y parecía esperar a alguien le dije después de esto me sacas los comedones no? A lo que me respondió que si (siento que fue porque le pregunté ) me extraño mucho esto porque después de
pasarme agua frío obviamente tengo los poros cerrados.

4. Le pregunto pero no pones vapor porque el dolor era insoportable y yo que me he hecho limpieza varias veces siempre te abren los poros y no agarran un aparato de manera tan brusca. Ella me indicó que ella no usaba vapor.

5. Me colocó un hidratante y listo.

Cabe destacar que mientras me atendía tenía guantes y a su vez manipuló con los guantes puestos su celular (bacterias)

Desde que llegue hasta que sali pasaron 23min solamente, entre al consultorio a las  14:35 (mientras ella buscaba el chat con el cupón, me pidió el favor enviárselo nuevamente y así los  hice) me quite mi abrigo y parte de la ropa que llevaba encima (2min aprox)  y vaya sorpresa la limpieza fue tan rápida que fui  a vestirme y  al terminar de vestirme y ver mi celular eran a las 14:58...

y eso que mientras le enviaba el cupón, y me quitaba lo que traía encima es tiempo que se pierde al igual que al terminar son unos minutos.

No quiero obviar detalles como no tienen bata, cuando te aplica la crema llega hasta tu cabello, una falta total de delicadeza.

Súper decepcionada de este centro. ADJUNTO FOTOS DE EVIDENCIA","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDG2Nf0fw&fid=0x0:0xadadac747ae42029"],"When":"2021-11-17"},{"Name":"Tatiana Zubrienko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWfg2kMgdsr9Vbxti55Md5Pk4Kvye3Z9m4JjOsWBO5qymm28Qd_=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Horrible experiencia! Pesimas condiciones. Hice limpieza facial en este sitio y me ha salido fatal. Despues de “limpieza profunda” sigo teniendo los puntitos negros incluso mas faciles de quitar con las manos!! Los pores cerrados apenas han tocado
El agua chorreaba por el cuello y me ha mojado todo mi pelo y ropa
Ni siquiera han puesto ni un pañuelo.

Todas heramientas estan amontonados encima de la silla al lado de la mesa y un apprato de microdermoabrasión parece ser de aliexpress…en fin

El tratamiento indicaba 45min
He tardado 25min incluyendo la búsqueda de la sala","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Nael Carrion","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3wgCQ_bolA9xpevC2W0wv-rd1_HpL3P2hxM8z7IL6EfV8sQ2POw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It's nice I mean awesome for a student who wants to be succeed in the future it inspired me to study","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"covadonga alvarez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVdK3SRJI_BSyR7dxlZ6sVUEfzN-wCBtFT_4mLQKmPnAluJcKQw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Mi experiencia con ISEP ha sido muy decepcionante. Durante el curso, la atención por parte de los asesores y tutores ha sido irregular y poco clara, especialmente en la fase final de la formación. La falta de seguimiento, los retrasos en las respuestas y la ausencia de coordinación han generado una situación muy frustrante, en la cual llevo 9 meses y siguen sin dar respuesta claras.

Pese a haber completado los módulos del máster, el proceso final estuvo marcado por retrasos, falta de seguimiento y ausencia de respuestas durante semanas e incluso meses. No se cumplieron los plazos de revisión ni se asignó tutor en tiempo, y tuve que insistir reiteradamente para obtener información básica.

La única solución ofrecida fueron ampliaciones de plazo que debían ser abonadas, a pesar de que los retrasos no fueron responsabilidad mía. No se respetó la normativa ni el contrato firmado, y no hubo un acompañamiento real en una etapa clave del posgrado.

No recomiendo este centro si se espera seriedad, cumplimiento de plazos y una gestión adecuada por parte de los tutores u asesores . Para el precio que tiene esta formación, la gestión y el soporte ofrecidos dejan mucho que desear.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sanchez D. Jessica","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ7qnRBCasa2e9yNouFzMA8P4zWhugKhkqXKsqFNzShs82jkUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Por favor no tomen estos programas, por el mismo costo y modalidad hay universidades en España mucho mejores como VIU, UNIR, UOC que dan títulos oficiales al mismo precio y algunos mayor calidad. NO COMETAN EL ERROR QUE YO TUVE AL ESTUDIAR AQUI! Y complicarme al intentar usar este título profesionalmente en otros países.  ISEP no te menciona las dificultades de un título propio en el futuro, nunca podrás acreditarla,","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jimmy Rodriguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX4TvXExFc0RftGmUbj2oW6mYwUT34kwViu3S3BLk_hfqIbHs3h=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Durante todo el proceso en la universidad, Silvia Soler fue una pieza fundamental y una gran aliada. Desde el primer momento demostró un alto nivel de profesionalismo, compromiso y empatía. Siempre estuvo disponible para brindar apoyo, responder cada una de mis preguntas con rapidez y claridad, y ofrecer la orientación necesaria en cada paso del camino.

Lo que más destaco de Silvia es su amabilidad y su actitud proactiva. No solo se limitaba a responder, sino que iba más allá, buscando siempre soluciones efectivas y alternativas cuando surgía alguna dificultad. Su forma de comunicarse transmitía confianza, tranquilidad y un genuino deseo de ayudar.

Gracias a su acompañamiento, el proceso fue mucho más sencillo, organizado y positivo. Es evidente que Silvia posee una gran vocación de servicio y un profundo conocimiento de los procedimientos universitarios. Sin duda, su apoyo marcó una diferencia significativa en mi experiencia académica y personal. Estoy muy agradecido por toda su ayuda y por la dedicación con la que realiza su trabajo.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"nacho castaño","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVOIRdnzwVsOMIvZkEM4sa3SewDRQdiO3k-FoqvWH8a5xuQ4K8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Les pedí que me entregasen un documento que es gratuito en todas las universidades ( periodo de prácticas ) y me quieren cobran 20€. Solo les interesa el dinero. Una vergüenza","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Helena Montoya","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLm9eLc7uBMiImeCYaDYJXMkYqfEH7qPQas4HN6Lf-bNAUBPA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tuve la suerte de terminar un doble máster en ISEP y no puedo estar más agradecida por todo lo que me han aportado, tanto en lo académico, como en lo personal.

Desde el primer día me encontré con profesionales de muy buen nivel académico,  cercanos y dispuestos a acompañarnos en cada etapa del camino.

También quiero dar un agradecimiento especial a Pamela, Jefa de Estudios, que estuvo a mi lado en momentos claves como la entrega del TFM y después de graduarme, haciéndome sentir que ISEP siempre será mi casa.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"LILIANA CAMPOS","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKeUqCMjnN5ZzmCgOLJVSO894hs4R_G_5r1IJ-no1qfg255U_I=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mi experiencia ha sido muy enriquecedora. La formación me permitió adquirir herramientas que fomentaron un aprendizaje significativo.
Destaco especialmente el compromiso y la calidad humana del equipo docente, siempre dispuestos a acompañar, orientar y motivar al alumnado.
Me siento satisfecha y agradecida y sin duda, recomiendo esta institución.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Keren Sofía Salazar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBZpxFfYk5KYquG4LfLF4jGLJ6zB3ljxsGGKpGcl9YbFW1aUE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hacer un diplomado con ISEP fue una experiencia que dejó un marca inolvidable en mi historia de vida y aprendizaje. Las instalaciones son cómodas y bonitas, los maestros tienen mucho conocimiento por dar, y estudiar con personas de diferentes países me permitió tener nuevas relaciones y un enriquecimiento cultural.
Definitivamente estudiar con ISEP vale la pena.","Images":null,"When":""}]

The outdoor area is (in my opinion) the best in the city and they use it everyday for play based learning. It's been a really positive experience for us and I'd highly recommend to anyone considering an international school in Madrid.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrea Hill MD","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKrRZf2URU1kvwFOF5CdhZ2xqSfumBqX9ASsGHGPSXjnP86Uw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I have been thinking about how to write this review in a way that will truly help others make an informed choice. I will start with the fact that we are Americans who moved to Madrid and thought attending an American school would make a soft landing into Spain.
The price of the school was quite honestly cheap compared to top schools in the US. So, I didn’t factor in the price point for Latin Americans and Europeans. We sadly found the school to be full of entitled, arrogant badly behaving children with teachers and administration who failed again and again to correct bullying.
My daughter was ridiculed, called fat and ugly by a bully, and her teacher never intervened. In fact, her teacher allowed her entire class to laugh at her. When the bullying worsened, the bully got physical and kneed her in the stomach causing her to vomit and it just went downhill. Her teacher defended the bully  and even made my daughter apologize whenever she attempted to stand up for herself or even dish some of it back to her bully.
I emailed and requested intervention and no help was given. Whenever my daughter tried to talk to teacher and others, the bully lied and my daughter was called a liar by her  teacher. .
This all ended with the bully shoving her off a seesaw onto  another metal piece of playground equipment and my daughter sustained a traumatic brain injury. No teachers witnessed it, because the supervision on the playground is beyond horrible, and the bully denied it. So, the school did nothing to my daughter’s assailant, in spite of her nearly month long brain recovery.
Other children have had Injuries from Bullies. Heads slammed into lunch trays and teachers simply putting ice on the injured child’s forehead without any action taken toward the bully, and many more examples. One girl was bullied so badly she became suicidal.
My daughter said, after changing schools, “ Mom the worst thing about Brewster was when a kid cried, the teachers never asked what was wrong. They just didn’t care.”

As a parent though, I thought,, aside from my daughter’s  brain damage, the worst part about Brewster  was that when we changed schools, we found she had learned nothing in almost a year of school at Brewster and she was behind in math, even though when she started school at Brewster she was 99% in standardized testing in Math.

A waste of tuition, a horrible culture of entitled brats bullying others while being enabled by teachers and administrators. Save money. Save your child. Stay away.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"J. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Lara larissa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL0IiqTcL6aaDj2lX-G24rolZrRlNHnr0Jk7qxuYXFTpHL3og=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hace justo un año que me opere con  los doctores Machado y Arenas. Fui desde Barcelona hasta Madrid para operarme con ellos y sin duda fue la mejor decisión que tomé. Mi caso era bastante complejo, ya que tenía una hernia bastante grande debido a mis cesáreas lo que me había generado también una diastasis importante, y salió todo a la perfección. Todo el equipo es de 10! Las chicas que te atienden son muy majas!  Siempre que tengo la posibilidad los recomiendo porque son un equipo muy profesional y también humano!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Estefania Rey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmsVgK_agavkwVvooSTStkPxrZiUbR76MKdLRJHv9gQ_B6ruS7=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Me operé de diástasis abdominal en julio de 2023 con el Dr. Machado, y lo que empezó con ilusión ha terminado siendo una de las mayores decepciones de mi vida.

El doctor me retiró el drenaje muy pronto y se desarrolló un seroma persistente. La única solución que se me ofreció fueron punciones semanales, que acepté con paciencia y confianza, pensando que era algo puntual. Esa situación se prolongó durante 7 meses, desde julio de 2023 hasta febrero de 2024, siempre a la espera de una solución definitiva que nunca llegó.

Soy una persona delgada, talla XS, y con el paso de los meses mi cuerpo empezó a cambiar de una forma muy dolorosa: deformidades, dolor abdominal constante, sensibilidad extrema, bultos… Durante todo ese tiempo, lo único que recibí fueron más punciones, cambios de fajas y antibióticos, mientras mi situación empeoraba.

Me gasté muchísimo dinero en fisioterapia, intentando aliviar un dolor que no tenía antes de operarme. Al mismo tiempo, veía en redes sociales cómo se publicaban anuncios de influencers que entraban por segunda vez a quirófano para “arreglar” problemas derivados de la cirugía, mientras yo, una paciente real, pedía ayuda sin obtener respuestas claras. Siempre se me decía que la cirugía estaba bien hecha y que se buscaría una solución, pero esas palabras nunca se tradujeron en hechos.

Muchas personas, incluso profesionales, me advirtieron de que conmigo no se estaba siguiendo el protocolo adecuado, pero el doctor me repetía una y otra vez que confiara en él. Yo confié. Y esperé. Y aguanté.

El resultado final ha sido fibrosis, deformidades visibles, dolor abdominal persistente y marcas en la piel. Durante mucho tiempo pensé que el seguimiento era correcto, que al menos no me estaban abandonando. Sin embargo, cuando después de meses de sufrimiento y de haber sido paciente y comprensiva acudí con mi madre para ya exigir de una vez por todas una solución real, dejé de recibir respuesta a mis correos y llamadas.

Hoy tengo muchos más problemas que antes de entrar a quirófano.

Comparto mi experiencia con tristeza, pero también con responsabilidad, para que otras personas puedan decidir con información de pacientes reales. Mi experiencia ha sido profundamente decepcionante.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elaine Bonfatti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLS09WQS5fKHbk6G7wGPPhvD3WrT_FkbeYgCkSYMAx6ZCkiug=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Me realicé una cirugía de diástasis con el Dr. Luis y el Dr. Machado, y no puedo estar más agradecida por todo el proceso y el resultado. El acompañamiento del equipo fue impecable. La fisioterapeuta me asesoró en cada etapa, explicando con detalle la recuperación y dándome pautas que marcaron una gran diferencia. Las secretarias y enfermeras fueron siempre amables, atentas y resolvieron todas mis dudas con paciencia. El anestesista también me dio mucha tranquilidad el día de la cirugía, explicando todo paso a paso.
En conjunto, ha sido una experiencia excelente, con un equipo humano y altamente cualificado que te hace sentir segura en todo momento. ¡Muy recomendado!
Ahora si tengo un abdomen funcional y esteticamente lindo.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marylucy Robaina Soto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI4W8gu-2sNl9wDnRMbbBtbDmTmXbNbpwhZ1nDrZlCUKBqBZg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Estoy súper contenta y agradecida por haber encontrado a este equipazo❤️, hace 1 mes me operé y no puedo estar más feliz 😍. (Dr. Pedro Machado🔝y Dr. Luis Arenas🔝), un trato increíble por parte de todo el equipo, cercanía, empatía, siempre disponibles… que suerte de haberos encontrado la verdad 🙏🏼

Seis meses después, puedo afirmar sin lugar a dudas que tomé la decisión correcta. Mi recuperación ha sido increíble: he ganado fuerza, he dejado atrás los dolores de espalda y las malas digestiones, y, lo más importante, he aprendido a reconocer y querer mi cuerpo nuevamente.
Quiero agradecer a todo el equipo que me acompañó en este viaje. Desde el preoperatorio, con cada llamada y gestión a cargo de María; el apoyo en la puesta en marcha de mi cuerpo a través de la nutrición  con Cristina; hasta la gran labor de la doctora Érika Sanjuan quien resolvió todas mis dudas y ahuyentó mis temores de entrar en quirófano. No puedo dejar de nombrar a Ana y a María que en cada una de sus maravillosas sesiones me he sentido arropada. Cada mensaje, cada consulta, ha sido un recordatorio de lo fácil que han hecho este proceso.
